name: Customer Concentration (HHI)
notes: HHI estimated as lower bound from top-5 shares (sum of squared %). Cap 60 if top customer >30%.

name: Revenue Growth Consistency
logic_json: {"rules": "cagr>=15 and down==0 ->100; cagr>=10 and down<=1 ->75; cagr>=5 and down<=1 ->50; cagr<0 ->0; else 25", "na_when": {"history_years_lt": 3}}
notes: CAGR over provided fiscal years; down = count of down years. N/A below 3 fiscal years (consistency needs >=2 growth periods).

name: Churn Rate (NRR)
notes: Known NRR bands as before. 'unknown' is Not Applicable (excluded + re-normalized) rather than scored at the worst band; it still raises a not-tracked flag.

name: Addback Defensibility Index
notes: Questionnaire proxy for % of addback dollars rated LOW CHALLENGE (>=80% -> 100).

name: Average Customer Tenure
notes: N/A below 5 years in business: average tenure is bounded by company age, so a younger firm cannot attain the benchmark regardless of loyalty.

name: Compensation vs Market
notes: Below market = flight risk; far above = cost structure risk.

name: Retention History
notes: Lower is better. N/A below 3 years in business (trailing-3yr turnover has no history).

name: Revenue CAGR (3yr)
notes: N/A below 3 fiscal years (a 2-point CAGR is not yet a trend).

name: Pipeline Coverage Ratio
notes: Ratio = qualified pipeline / most recent annual revenue. No pipeline = 0.

name: Market Positioning
notes: Top band raised to 100 (DRS-2.0) for consistency with every other select_map.

name: Valuation Currency
notes: v1 convention. N/A below 3 years in business: too young to be expected to hold a current professional valuation.
